raw_text: I accidentally added an extra item after placing my order. There was no option to modify or remove the item, even though the order had not yet been packed or dispatched. This was very disappointing and made for a poor customer experience.

great app! fully satisfied with your hospitality but from my experience I like to give a give a disclaimer to new buyers as well as the old ones that before ordering something please keep change as been a daily customer I face this issue many time as you may not know when your online server would be down so from my experience keep change if you pay with cash otherwise this is the best app for your day to day life usage

This app is very good, and the service and timing are excellent, but I have had two unpleasant incidents. Once, a delivery partner asked me if i want to go out with him.On another occasion, after delivering the order, a delivery partner asked for my phone, claiming he needed to update the location because he had to proceed somewhere else. Your delivery partners severely lack professionalism; their behavior made me feel extremely uncomfortable, and it was highly inappropriate. Please take action

edited--Finaly I got refund. I had received stained and stale product. I placed a request for replacement and again received similar stained packaging. I refused to accept the product but delivery partner said there is no such option available to refuse delivery. He asked me to complain over phone or email. Also while raising a complaint you have to take pics every time from camera and there is no option to add image of product from gallery.

Blinkit dont allow exchange or return of items. This is not justified at all. All other online and offline shops have flexible policy in this regard. So be very careful when you are placing an order,else you will loose your hard earned money.

I have received expired products from Blinkit several times. Whenever I contacted customer support for a return or refund, my request was rejected every time. This is a deception and a serious risk to health. What is the point of 10-minute delivery if you are sending spoiled and expired goods? The service is terrible; I am done using it.

Your team is performing exceptionally well. I am particularly impressed by the speed with which the doctor's consultation was provided and the medication approved, with the prescriptions now en route. This application is truly a lifesaver. Congratulations on achieving such a high level of excellence.

As we go on adding items, the limit of free delivery goes on increasing.. when it's shows add items of particular amount to get free delivery. if items added, it shows again different saying add some more items.. very bad ... it means we have to go on adding items or what .. all business tactics

not 5 stars because if you are in time crunch this will come in heady, it should add more options for example:- it offers chips at 40₹ for a big packet instead it could try making a bundle of 4 10₹ packets of different varieties or let you choose that variety and buy that way

I had given a 5 star rating earlier now I am changing it to 1 star from the recent experience, I had ordered 3 french fries from Blinkit, it was delivered on time but this time all the frozen items were rotten and the expiry dates had been wiped clean. I request other users to uninstall the app and not order anything from blinkit.

i thought Blnkit was better. But Blinkit service is very bad. I ordered 8 parle milano cookies pkts,only 6 were sent. I asked to give a refund coupon for the 2 missing items. The customer care service made it look like I lied. They said they checked with the store and the delivery partber. When the items wete delivered, even the delivery partner sae only 6 came. The stire and the delivery agents lie.
The booking address should not be changed every time. The delivery address should remain the same while adding items in cart, and checking out (even if there is a break between these two).

Unethical and Fraud Application. I ordered a product by selecting my current address but it is not serviceable area. So I cancelled the order. the cancellation team guy told that refund only process through promo code only. I told him that I would not going to use this app anymore because am in un service area. I asked him to do the refund to original payment mode. But he refused to do that. he told there is only one option for refund is through promo code only. It's very attrocious

One just cannot see the invoice and cost breakup before making payment. Blinkit is so resistant to transparency. And one can chat only with a bot with pre-defined questions. Any other issue one faces, one just cannot raise it.

worst services! I've been ordering the products and every time I had the best experience but today I ordered a product for my family member and they received the wrong product, so I reached out to the customer care she said we can't help because the blinkit team has said the mistaken expired product which was delivered to me is not sold by them!! worst services !!! I just needed the product I don't need the money ! it was embarrassing for me that my family members had to receive the expired item

very bad..today I ordered and it shows me 8min and I still have not received after 45min and the customer service told me they can't connect with delivery person. is I am responsible for this and when I cancelled the order they told me you have to wait for 7days to get your refund. A very very bad experience i have with blinkit. cheap application and cheap service

To speak with customer support you have to first go through a bot which only has few options and none of which is do you want to speak with human and when you get to customer support they don't give resolution and disconnect the call and when you chat with them they give very slow reply and vague reply they themselves are not sure the issue is solved or not and when I ask them to send me in mail the issues which I have raised they don't do that and close the issue I have recordings to prove it.

Always better market shop than an online shopping platform. My experience shared... I ordered a Lifelong coffee maker date12-July-2026 Rs.1014 , but one part is missing from it—the section where the coffee is placed. I filed a complaint with Blinkit, but they refused and said that neither a replacement nor an exchange would be provided. However, it is clearly mentioned under the product that there is a 7-day replacement policy. They also told me to contact the Lifelong company directly.

I bought a long list of items and was eligible for a free gift of chocolate ice cream and missed out. You should make a free gift automatic. please do so in future I'm a frequent customer. why am I being charged delivery fees on every order, when others are getting free delivery, even from my own house

Worst app , it's a place to cheat customers only nothing else . these guys will try everything to cheat or to make a fraud with customers. Doesn't mean that There is not any mechanism to put your query or put your rights . Only one side communication and in last you have to raise a complaint in CONSUMER FORUM only like I did.
